guidance_notes: CapEx FY2027 > $6.1B (management: 'expect to increase'). Vera Rubin: produkcja H2 FY2027. Leasingi DC $32.4B zaplanowane FY2027-FY2033.
notes: DANE Z 10-K nvda-20260125.pdf. Revenue +65.5% YoY (FY2025: $130,497M). EBIT 60.4% obciazony $4.5B H20 charge Q1 FY2026 — underlying ~63%. D&A $2,843M + CapEx $6,042M z Cash Flow Statement. FCF = OCF $102,718M - CapEx $6,042M = $96,676M. Net cash = cash $10,605M + mkt sec $51,951M - dlug $8,468M = $54,088M. Dlug: senior notes $8,468M ($1B due 1yr, $2.75B 1-5yr, $1.25B 5-10yr, $3.5B >10yr). Buyback FY2026: 282M akcji / $40.4B. Shares outstanding Feb 20, 2026: 24,300M. Data Center rev $193,479M (+67% YoY), Edge Computing $22,459M (+57% YoY). Top 2 klienci: 22% + 14% = 36% rev.
